hero_title: Audit Trail for Travel Rule Events
hero_subtitle: SFTY preserves and connects Travel Rule provider outputs into a structured workflow for VASPs, ensuring detailed audit evidence, case linkage, and compliance-ready review history.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Travel Rule audit evidence remains scattered
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to preserve a clear and consistent audit trail across multiple Travel Rule providers. This fragmentation makes it difficult to reconstruct message routing, handle exceptions, and support defensible compliance reviews.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY unifies message routing data, exception workflows, provider outputs and review actions to create one consolidated audit trail supporting clear and defensible Travel Rule compliance operations.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exceptions to evidence
workflow_description: SFTY captures Travel Rule message routing and exception data then organizes review cases, preserves audit evidence and supports compliance reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another workflow tool. Travel Rule evidence control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects Travel Rule provider outputs into structured cases, decisions, audit evidence and workflows without replacing existing message routing or compliance systems.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs preserving audit evidence and provider outputs within controlled workflows to meet operational, bank due diligence and enterprise deployment requirements.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects Travel Rule provider outputs into structured workflows, routing messages, tracking status, managing exceptions and preserving evidence for VASP compliance review across jurisdictions.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle Travel Rule exceptions?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes exception events for manual review, creates cases linked to Travel Rule messages, and records decisions to support controlled handling of incomplete or high-risk transfers.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and provider data related to Travel Rule events, supporting audit-ready evidence and traceability throughout the compliance lifecycle.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate multiple Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: SFTY can orchestrate multiple Travel Rule providers, normalizing outputs and connecting their data into one compliance workflow without requiring replacement of existing systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule providers but connects their outputs into operational workflows, enabling a connected and auditable compliance control layer.
final_title: Preserve audit evidence for Travel Rule events
final_description: Review how SFTY connects Travel Rule provider outputs, exception handling and case linkage for structured compliance workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
